t_ch: 瞧见这队伍了吗？想见青总的人已经从这儿直接排到金人巷的尽头了。去旁边取个号，等着吧。
t_en: Do you see this queue? The line of people that wish to meet with President Qing already stretches all the way from here to Aurum Alley. Go, take a number and wait.

t_ch: 这要等多久啊？
t_en: How long will that take?

t_ch: 也许一周，也许几个月，谁知道呢？队伍最前头那家伙从三个月前就在这儿排着了。
t_en: Maybe a week, maybe a few months, who knows? That guy at the front of the queue has been waiting for three months.

t_ch: …那还是暴力驱邪吧？
t_en: ...So, we'll have to do this with violence?

t_ch: 打起来！打起来！我要看到血流成河！
t_en: Fight! Fight! I want to see rivers of blood!

t_ch: 不得造次！这位{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}我认得，{F#她}{M#他}是青总发迹前认识的朋友。
t_en: Not so fast! I know this {F#Miss}{M#Mr} {NICKNAME}, {F#she}{M#he} was a friend with President Qing before her great success.

t_ch: 又有一个太卜大人？
t_en: Another master diviner?

t_ch: 这个太卜又是怎么回事啊？
t_en: What's going on with the master diviner?

t_ch: 太卜大人，这只是幻象！
t_en: Master diviner, this is just a fantasy!

t_ch: 我现在已经不是太卜了，请不要再这样叫我了。
t_en: I am no longer the master diviner, please do not call me that again.

t_ch: 我只是罗浮帝玉集团旗下的一名普普通通打杂小职员罢了…以自己微不足道的眼界为青雀大人预测股票指数。
t_en: I am no more than a mere employee under the flag of the Luofu Dynasty Corp... I use my limited vision to predict stock fluctuations for President Qingque.

t_ch: 太卜大人，你看这…
t_en: Master diviner, do you see this...

t_ch: 你不用提醒我……
t_en: You don't need to rub it in...

t_ch: 可恶！竟让我在她的集团里当打杂的洗脚婢。
t_en: That.... she... I can't believe she made me a mere underling in her corporation!

t_ch: （适当沉默）
t_en: (Remain silent)

t_ch: 看来本座对她日常的教诲，她全然没有感激，反而留下了很深的心理阴影。
t_en: It seems that she isn't even slightly grateful for my teachings. In fact, it seems they've left a shadow on her psyche.

t_ch: 青总对你做了什么…
t_en: What has President Qing done to you...

t_ch: 青、青总给的实在太多了！
t_en: P—President Qing has been extremely kind to me!

t_ch: 呸呸！你这个不争气的家伙！
t_en: Eurgh! You pathetic wimp!

t_ch: 你在太卜司的工作呢？
t_en: What about your work in the Divination Commission?

t_ch: 太卜司…已变成了琼玉司——大家都在使用帝垣琼玉占卜，比穷观阵更灵验。
t_en: The Divination Commission... is now the Celestial Jade Commission... Everyone is using Celestial Jade for divination, and it is much more effective than the Matrix of Prescience.

t_ch: 我因此失业了。多亏了青雀大人宽宏大量，不计前嫌，给了我一份闲职让我勉强谋生。感恩青总！
t_en: I lost my job because of this. Thankfully, President Qingque was magnanimous enough to forgive me for my past wrongs, and gave me an easy job so I could scrape a living. My gratitude to President Qing!

t_ch: 呸呸！你这个不争气的家伙！
t_en: Eurgh! You pathetic wimp!

t_ch: 噗，符玄大人请不要在意，这只是幻觉！幻觉啊！
t_en: Ah, please don't take this to heart, Lady Fu Xuan! This is an illusion! Just a fantasy!

t_ch: 嘿嘿，你对着那假人喊破喉咙也没用啊。既然她想要玩大富翁游戏，咱们就陪她玩玩。
t_en: Hehe, there is no use tearing your throat apart screaming at a dummy. If it's a game of property trading board game she's after, we'll give it to her.

t_ch: 尾巴说的有理。呃，这位帝玉…集团的符玄小姐，不知道你能不能带咱们见到青总？
t_en: You have a point, Mr. Tail. Ahem, Miss Fu Xuan of the Dynasty... Corp... Would you be able to take us to meet with President Qingque?

t_ch: 当然！这些年来青总一直念叨着{NICKNAME}你的名字。
t_en: Of course! President Qing has been talking about {NICKNAME} for years.

t_ch: 看不出来我这么招人疼吗…
t_en: I bet you didn't realize I was so popular, did you?

t_ch: 幻觉里的时间观念还挺乱的…
t_en: The concept of time in this illusion is a mess...

t_ch: 跟我来吧。青总想要见见你，重温当年的友情。
t_en: Come with me. President Qing wishes to meet with you and rekindle your old friendship.

t_ch: 这…这里是司辰宫吧？
t_en: This... is the Palace of Astrum, isn't it?

t_ch: 您误会了，这里已经是琼玉牌馆了。青总远见卓识，早早地买下了司辰宫。
t_en: Ah, you misunderstand. This is the Jade Tile Parlor now. With her great foresight, President Qing bought the Palace of Astrum out long ago.

t_ch: 客人们，青总就在那边为员工赋能。我先行告退了。
t_en: Guests, President Qing is just over there inspiring her employees. I shall take my leave.

t_ch: 各位提出创意请一定要找准帝垣琼玉类棋牌游戏的差异化赛道，创造全新行业生态，直达消费者的痛点，引爆用户需求，请记住我们的理念是「帝垣琼玉创造快乐」！
t_en: I ask that when you propose creative ideas, that you find paths for tile games like Celestial Jade to diversify. Create a new industry ecology and access the pressure points of consumers directly to ignite user demand. Remember, our slogan is: "Celestial Jade creates happiness!"

t_ch: 咱们运营部计划为帝垣琼玉植入更多付费维度。我们打算为牌背、牌桌、牌手都制作可订制付费内容——
t_en: Our operations department plans to implant more micro-payments for Celestial Jade. We plan to create customizable paid content for tile backs, game tables and players—

t_ch: 严格来说，牌和手和牌手都没有关系，拆开收费，进一步深入挖掘用户付费潜力，合理！
t_en: Strictly speaking: Tiles, hands, and players are all separate entities. Charging separately for them and breaking down user payments to further exploit payment potential is only logical!

t_ch: 我们的竞业同行最喜欢用「玩法」来挑刺，说说你们准备了什么新玩法？
t_en: Our competitors like to use our lack of "game modes" as criticism. Tell me, what new game modes have you all come up with?

t_ch: 青总请看！我们充分理解玩家不喜欢你一回我一回的回合制模式，我设计了即时投掷琼玉牌互相战斗的模式，称之为「琼玉争霸」！
t_en: President Qing, look! We fully understand that our players do not enjoy turn-based combat, so we have designed a real-time Jade Tile battle mode named: "League of Jade Tiles"!

t_ch: 青总，这是让牌手们扮演不同职业，拥有不同能力的「牌与地下城」！
t_en: President Qing, this is "Tiles and Dungeons," it is an RPG in which players can play as different classes with various different abilities!

t_ch: 很好！很好！这些点子非常完美，用不了多久，就连巴维鲁人都会爱上琼玉牌！
t_en: Good! Very good! All of these ideas are perfect. With these improvements, even the Bavirus will be obsessed with Jade Tiles in no time!

t_ch: …看来我的客人等得不耐烦了，你们就接着研发，我要办些私事了。
t_en: ...It seems that my guests are growing impatient. You get on with research and development, I have private affairs to tend to.

t_ch: 这么多年过去了，{NICKNAME}，你一点都没变，真好啊！
t_en: Even after all these years, you haven't changed a bit, {NICKNAME}. What a pleasure!

t_ch: 想必你也是听说了我的成功，前来加入我向银河推广帝垣琼玉的伟大事业的吧？
t_en: I imagine you've heard of my success and have decided to join us in promoting the great cause that is Celestial Jade across the galaxy?

t_ch: 其实我是来唤醒你的。
t_en: I'm actually here to bring you back to reality.

t_ch: 青雀小姐，你被岁阳附体，陷入了不正常的幻觉中。我们是来帮你摆脱的。
t_en: Miss Qingque, you have been possessed by a heliobus and fallen into an abnormal illusion. We're here to help you escape.

t_ch: 幻觉？你是说我一手建立的事业全都是在做梦吗？这怎么可能，这些年奋斗的艰辛，成功的喜悦，怎么会是假的呢？
t_en: An illusion? You're saying that my self-made career is just a dream? How could that be? How could these years of struggle and hard work and the joy of my successes all be fake?

t_ch: 听说你想见我。
t_en: I heard you wanted to see me.

t_ch: 是的，本想以普通老友的身份叙叙旧，但时间宝贵，咱们就直入主题吧。
t_en: That's right. I was hoping to reminisce over the past with you as an old friend, but time is money. Let's get straight to the point.

t_ch: 其实，是太卜担心你…
t_en: Actually, the master diviner is worried about you...

t_ch: 太卜？哼哼，这不是小玄子么。你为什么还杵在这里摸鱼，该去干活了！
t_en: The master diviner? Heh, if it isn't Little Xuany! What are you doing here slacking off, get to work!

t_ch: 冷静，太卜大人！这一切都是虚假幻象。
t_en: Stay calm, master diviner! This is all just an illusion!

t_ch: 哼！本座当然知道！是…是了，青总，我这就去干活。
t_en: Humph! I know that, of course! Y—Yes President Qing, I will get to work now.

t_ch: 说回正题！{NICKNAME}，如果不是多年前遇到你，我不会鼓起勇气辞职创业，那句话怎么说来着？命运的齿轮开始转动……
t_en: Back to the point! {NICKNAME}, if I hadn't met you all those years ago, I would never have gathered the courage to quit my job and start my business. What was it you said to me back then? "The gears of fate are beginning to turn..."

t_ch: 为了报答你，我决定给你一次改变人生的机会，跟我来！
t_en: To repay you, I have decided to give you an opportunity to completely transform your life, come with me!

t_ch: 其他人嘛，小玄子，给他们找点事做。
t_en: As for the others, Xuany, find something for them to do.

t_ch: 我不知道她要带你去做什么…但务必当心一点，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: I don't know where she is taking you... But you must remain cautious, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 如果需要我们，就大声呼救。
t_en: If you need us, just call out for help.

t_ch: 我罗浮帝玉集团立志要为全宇宙的牌手提供最爽快的服务！
t_en: My Luofu Dynasty Corp is dedicated to providing the most satisfying service to game players across the entire universe!

t_ch: 可惜帝垣琼玉的规则太古老陈旧了，如果想让全宇宙不同文明的人为它疯狂，必须给它注入全新的活力。
t_en: Unfortunately, the rules of Celestial Jade are outdated. If we want different cultures across the entire universe to go crazy for it, we have to give it a new lease on life!

t_ch: 你刚才看到了许多不同的琼玉牌玩法，它们每一个都很有潜力。但我心中坚信，没有哪个比眼前这个模式更有传播力。
t_en: You just saw lots of different game modes for Jade Tiles, they all have a lot of potential. But I am convinced that none of them have the wide appeal of this mode before you.

t_ch: 这是什么？
t_en: What's this?

t_ch: 开箱！
t_en: Mystery boxes!

t_ch: 推琼玉箱子？
t_en: Jade Tile promotional chests?

t_ch: 不对，我打算在帝垣琼玉中加入开箱！
t_en: No, I plan to introduce mystery boxes into Celestial Jade!

t_ch: 牌手们打开随机的箱子，就会有机会获得牌型中欠缺的琼玉牌，一抽之间便能决定胜负！
t_en: Players will open random chests and have a chance to receive Jade Tiles missing from their decks. One draw can mean the difference between victory and defeat!

t_ch: 每个箱子被打开时，里面都有出现金色传说的机会！
t_en: When each chest is opened, there is a chance to receive a Golden Legend!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，来试试看！要不了多久，你会迷上这种感觉的。
t_en: Give it a try, {NICKNAME}! I know you'll be hooked in no time!

t_ch: 如何？
t_en: Well?

t_ch: 不会吧？全是毫无价值的东西。
t_en: No way? It's all useless rubbish.

t_ch: 这些箱子就没有十连保底的吗？
t_en: Is there no <unbreak>10</unbreak>x draw guarantee?

t_ch: 一定是掉率出了问题，我现在将金色传说的掉率提高。
t_en: There must have been something wrong with the drop rate, I'll boost the drop-rate of Golden Legends right now.

t_ch: 来，再试试看！
t_en: Here, give it a try!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，怎么样你喜欢这种感觉吗？
t_en: What do you think, {NICKNAME}? Do you love how it feels?

t_ch: 金色的…垃圾？
t_en: Golden... trash?

t_ch: 重要的是感觉！它金光闪闪从箱子里蹦出来样子，你不快乐吗？
t_en: What matters is how it feels! Do you not feel overjoyed seeing its golden sparkle as it appears from the chest?

t_ch: 这根本不是帝垣琼玉！
t_en: This is not Celestial Jade!

t_ch: 这就是帝垣琼玉！作为这套牌戏的再发现者和推广者，我比你更有资格定义帝垣琼玉的形式。
t_en: This is Celestial Jade! As the person that rediscovered and promoted this game, I am far more qualified than you to decide the form that Celestial Jade takes!

t_ch: 抽卡并不能提升游戏趣味…
t_en: Drawing cards won't make the game itself more fun...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}， 你变了。曾经那么无私快乐的你，居然变得如此斤斤计较。你让我感到…很陌生。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you've changed. You used to be so joyful and selfless, now you're picky and fickle. I feel like I... don't know you anymore.

t_ch: 如果你不能从中感到乐趣，我就打算把你留在这儿不停开箱子，直到你能深切体会它的乐趣为止！
t_en: If you don't enjoy this, I will have you stay here and open chests until you can fully appreciate the fun!

t_ch: （糟糕，这个岁阳试图用这种方式困住我…）
t_en: (Oh no! The heliobus is trying to use this as a way to trap me...)

t_ch: 你正犹豫着该如何脱困，忽然有人急促的拍打门扉，闯了进来……
t_en: As you consider how to escape, there is a hurried knocking on the door as someone charges in...

t_ch: 不、不好了，青总！
t_en: P—President Qing, we're in huge trouble!

t_ch: 什么事？
t_en: What is it?

t_ch: 一个坏消息，星际和平娱乐复刻帝垣琼玉的规则推出了一款牌戏！
t_en: I have terrible news. The Interastral Peace Entertainment has created a knock-off of Celestial Jade!

t_ch: 什么，快些提起诉讼，我要告他们侵权！
t_en: What? File a lawsuit, now! I'm suing them for copyright infringement!

t_ch: 呃…还、还有更糟的消息在后头呢！星际和平公司已经抢先宣布了新作品！
t_en: Uhm... There's actually worse news to come! The IPC have already gotten ahead of us to announce the new product!

t_ch: …呜！可恶可恶！只是些技术性调整而已…{NICKNAME}，我要不要在新玩法上赌一把？
t_en: ...Agh! Curse them! We just need a few technical adjustments... {NICKNAME}, should I take a gamble on this new game mode?

t_ch: 这是一场豪赌，朋友！
t_en: It's a big gamble, my friend!

t_ch: 还能再赌一赌，朋友！
t_en: You can afford the risk, my friend!

t_ch: 要不放手一搏，朋友！
t_en: Why not save yourself the risk, my friend!

t_ch: 都到这份上了，朋友！
t_en: I've told you what I think, my friend!

t_ch: 你说的对，我要赌上全部身家！小玄子，启动我们的应急资产……
t_en: You're right, I have to bet everything I have! Xuan, launch our emergency assets...

t_ch: 我们已经被星际和平公司抄底，他们买下了帝玉集团的所有股票。
t_en: We've already been bottom-fished by the IPC, they've bought out all of the Dynasty Corp's stocks.

t_ch: 输得一塌糊涂，朋友。
t_en: It's a total wipeout, my friend.

t_ch: 为什么、为什么事情会演变到这个地步？
t_en: Why? Why has it come to this?

t_ch: 青雀的声线逐渐变得高亢嘶哑，回荡在房间的每个角落。
t_en: Qingque's voice gradually grows more high-pitched and shrill, echoing across corner of the room.

t_ch: 你这个没用的东西，你被开除了！
t_en: Y—You useless fool! You're fired!

t_ch: 哼，这岁阳老总的脾气当真厉害哟……
t_en: Hmph, President Heliobus really has a ferocious temper...

t_ch: 连青雀这么与世无争的性子，都被它困在了名和利的漩涡里啊。不过说到底，这些不过是欺骗宿主的幻觉罢了，一戳就破。
t_en: Even an aloof young girl like Qingque has been trapped in the vortex of fame and fortune. Although when it comes down to it, these are nothing more than fantasies used to deceive the host. One push and they come crumbling down.

t_ch: 你是…真太卜！
t_en: You're... the real master diviner!

t_ch: 好家伙，差点被你给唬住了。
t_en: Nice work, I almost fell for your bluff!

t_ch: 我和那个赝品完全不一样啊！我还以为你一眼就看明白了呢！
t_en: I am nothing like that imposter! I thought such a thing would be clear to you at a single glance!

t_ch: 怎么样，本座略施小计，就轻易动摇这家伙的美梦了。
t_en: What do you think? I put a little plan together and easily crushed their dreams!

t_ch: 我赋予青雀的梦想才不会这么快被你动摇！{NICKNAME}，听好了，我有个能让大家都发财的主意！
t_en: The dream I have given Qingque will not be so easily crushed! {NICKNAME}, listen to me, I have a way to make everyone rich!

t_ch: 你代表星穹列车和我签下合同，我们一起将帝垣琼玉推广到蛮荒世界里。有了列车，我们会比公司更快一步抢占蓝海市场的。你觉得怎么样？
t_en: You sign a contract with me as a representative of the Astral Express, then we can spread Celestial Jade to even more remote worlds! With the Express, we can get to untapped markets before the IPC does. What do you think?

t_ch: 不怎么样…
t_en: It's not a great plan...

t_ch: 该说「糟透了」。不要鼓动一个快乐的孩子无端做什么发财梦啦，岁阳！
t_en: It's terrible! Don't go encouraging a happy young girl to go chasing dreams of delusional fame and riches, heliobus!

t_ch: 缺乏实践可行性。
t_en: It's not practical or realistic.

t_ch: 想的虽然很美，可惜无名客却不会答应你。
t_en: You have great aspirations, but the Nameless will not indulge you.

t_ch: 快快从青雀身上离开！
t_en: Leave Qingque's body, now!

t_ch: 没错，钻进我下属的脑瓜里，种下这等遥不可及的愚妄幻想，不可饶恕！
t_en: That's right, digging into the mind of my subordinate and planting unrealistic and foolish fantasies like this is unforgivable!

t_ch: 接下来该是你们完成使命的时间了，判官，{NICKNAME}，把这家伙和青雀分开！
t_en: It's time for you to finish your mission, Judge, {NICKNAME}. Separate Qingque from this thing!

t_ch: 像你们这样来闹事的家伙…大爷我可见多了！
t_en: Troublemakers like you... I've seen many!

t_ch: 但统统都让大爷给打发了！
t_en: But I defeated them all!

t_ch: 这家伙说话的口气和尾巴好像！
t_en: This guy talks a lot like Tail!

t_ch: 给我专心点！
t_en: Focus!

t_ch: 呜咕，现在打帝垣琼玉决胜负还来得及吗？
t_en: Ugh, it is too late to decide this with a game of Celestial Jade?

t_ch: 愚蠢，我本可以让你富可敌国！
t_en: Fools! I could have given you all unimaginable fortune!

t_ch: 我可以让你们比公司更富有！
t_en: I could make you richer than the IPC!

t_ch: 不，我的商业版图…
t_en: No, my business plans...

t_ch: 新的玩法被熔断了…
t_en: The new gameplay has been cut...

t_ch: 都给你说了，看反馈！
t_en: I told you already. Just look at the feedback!

t_ch: 我看了反馈，改不了！
t_en: I've looked at the feedback and I can't change anything!

t_ch: 帝垣琼玉需要一次革命。
t_en: Celestial Jade needs a revolution.

t_ch: 帝垣琼玉玩法太单一了…
t_en: Celestial Jade gameplay is always the same...

t_ch: （没出货。）
t_en: (Nothing.)

t_ch: （什么垃圾。）
t_en: (What trash.)

t_ch: （下一抽必出…）
t_en: (Next one has gotta win...)

t_ch: （求求你，出货啊…）
t_en: (Please, this time...)

t_ch: 每<unbreak>10</unbreak>次跃迁必出稀有或以上的帝垣琼玉牌。
t_en: Every <unbreak>10</unbreak> Warps guarantees a Rare or better Celestial Jade tile.

t_ch: 哎呀，资源都是我给你的，不要客气嘛，直接<unbreak>10</unbreak>连！
t_en: *sigh* Don't be shy. I'll put up the resources for it. Do <unbreak>10</unbreak> in a row!

t_ch: 琼玉补给箱
t_en: Jade Supply Crate

t_ch: 凶宅…闹鬼…我已经嗅到了粉丝数上涨的气息了。
t_en: A haunted house... A ghost... I can already smell our followers increasing!

t_ch: …这肯定是岁阳作祟吧？
t_en: ...This must be the work of a heliobus?

t_ch: 嗯，多半是。
t_en: Yes, I imagine so.

t_ch: 不排除有弄虚作假的可能…
t_en: We're not ruling out the chance that it's a fraud...?

t_ch: …{NICKNAME}说的对，还得实际走访之后才能有结论。
t_en: ...{NICKNAME} is right. We'll need to visit personally to reach a proper conclusion.

t_ch: 毫无疑问，这肯定是岁阳！
t_en: There's no doubt about it. It's a heliobus!

t_ch: 网络上真真假假的信息混淆不清…咱们还得实际走访之后才能有结论。
t_en: It's so hard to tell what's true and what's not on the network... We should go and visit before reaching a conclusion.

t_ch: 所以，藿藿你会去吗？
t_en: So, will you go, Huohuo?

t_ch: 我在其他帖子上找到了一些有关尾巴的线索，我想去确认一下……
t_en: I've found some clues that may be linked to Tail on another post. I want to go and confirm for myself...

t_ch: 藿藿就去做你想做的事吧。我和{NICKNAME}、小桂子去一探凶宅！
t_en: You go and do what you need, Huohuo. Little Gui, {NICKNAME}, and I will go to the haunted house!

t_ch: 放心交给我们吧。
t_en: Don't worry. We're on it.

t_ch: 藿藿要是遇到困难也随时告诉我们。
t_en: Make sure you tell us if you come across any trouble, Huohuo.

t_ch: …其实我更想去找尾巴。
t_en: ...I actually want to find Tail more.

t_ch: 其实我也不确定消息是真是假，不好麻烦大家……
t_en: I'm not actually sure if these messages are reliable, so I don't want to trouble you all...

t_ch: 藿藿，有什么困难记得要跟我们讲哦。
t_en: Huohuo, make sure you tell us if you come across any trouble!

t_ch: 毕竟我们四个人才是捉鬼小队嘛。
t_en: After all, it's not the ghost-hunting squad without any of us, right?

t_ch: …谢谢。
t_en: ...Thank you.

t_ch: 我私信联系了一下发帖人，他给我发了个地址。那么捉鬼小队出动！
t_en: I've messaged the person who made the post, and he has sent me an address. Alright, ghost-hunting squad, let's move out!

t_ch: 出动！
t_en: Move out!

t_ch: 到碰面的地方了，那个人应该就是发帖人吧？
t_en: This is the meeting place. That must be the person who made the post?

t_ch: …你们可算来了，就是我，我就是凶宅的房东，叫我雷诺就好。
t_en: ...You're finally here. It's me, and I am the landlord of the haunted house. Just call me Renault.

t_ch: 哦哦哦，走吧，现在就去你的凶宅里一探究竟！
t_en: Woo, let's go! It's time to investigate your haunted house!

t_ch: 等等，你们之中那个…十王司专家呢？
t_en: Wait a minute. Where is your Ten-Lords member?

t_ch: 我们虽然不是十王司，但都挺有本事的，有什么不能告诉我们的吗？
t_en: We may not be members of the Ten-Lords, but we're all pretty capable! Is there something that you cannot tell us?

t_ch: 我可不是嫌弃你们，「罗浮杂俎」上怪事甚多，但大多都是捕风捉影、无凭无据的假消息，根本经不起推敲…但这次不一样，我遇上了真家伙！
t_en: It's not that I am looking down on you. It's just that there are so many strange stories on the Ghostly Grove, and so many of them are just baseless made-up stories... But this time, I've met the real thing!

t_ch: 如果十王司不能出手，只凭你们几人恐怕是无济于事。
t_en: Without the assistance of the Ten-Lords Commission, I fear that you alone may not be of any use.

t_ch: 我们也遇上过真家伙！
t_en: We've dealt with the real thing before, too!

t_ch: 要我说，十王司也不过如此。
t_en: If you ask me, the Ten-Lords Commission aren't all they're cracked up to be.

t_ch: 你这{F#小姑娘}{M#小子}也太狂了。
t_en: You talk big, {F#girl}{M#boy}.

t_ch: 说不定你才是在弄虚作假。
t_en: For all we know, you're the one making up stories.

t_ch: 嘿，你还别不信。
t_en: Hey! You still don't believe me?

t_ch: 这样吧，有些事情我没有在帖子里讲，讲完以后，你们肯定就明白了。
t_en: Fine. There are some things that I did not mention in my original post. You'll understand once I explain.

t_ch: 起初，我这是在这里低价购置了一处房产，以为自己占了便宜。卖房以后，前房主音讯全无，后来我才知道过去每一任房主都没有善终。
t_en: At first, this was just a property that I bought at a low price, thinking I'd gotten myself a steal. But, after they sold me the property, I never heard from the previous owner again. It was later that I learned that every prior landlord had met with an unfortunate end.

t_ch: 我本是不相信「凶宅」这些说法的…但自从我住下之后，开始出现咳嗽、胸闷等症状，这让我不得不开始紧张起来。
t_en: I never used to believe in "haunted houses" or things like that... But, ever since I moved in, I've developed a cough and it was difficult for me to even breathe sometimes. It's starting to make me nervous.

t_ch: 后来，我找到风水大师，他看着罗盘说「这房子虽有窗轩却不通阳气，虽有院墙却不能聚财；东面病役众多，西面人丁不齐。四方不顺，五行相克……」
t_en: After some time, I found a geomantic master. He checked his compass and said that: "Though there are windows and pavilions, there is no flow of yang energy. The courtyard walls do not foster a growth of wealth. There is sickness to the east and the population to the west lacks harmony in community. The four directions are not favorable and the five elements clash..."

t_ch: 「再加之，这房屋历史久远，居者皆破，冥差接引频频，冤魂不散；我劝你三日之内速速离开，否则便是重症难愈、大难临头。」
t_en: "What's more, this house has a long history and all residents have met with ruin. Spiritfarers are frequently called, yet the spirits of the aggrieved dead linger. My advice: Move out within three days, or you will fall gravely ill and tragedy will befall you."

t_ch: 这位风水大师不会是个骗子吧？
t_en: Are you sure this geomantic master isn't just a con man?

t_ch: 你只要去过，就知道大师所言不假。
t_en: Once you're inside, you will know that the master was telling the truth.

t_ch: 我命由我不由天，你应该住下去。
t_en: We decide our fates, not the heavens. You should continue living there.

t_ch: 住什么住？！得亏我搬出及时，不然我早就魔阴身了。
t_en: What do you mean? Continue living there!? If I hadn't moved out when I did, I'd have fallen into mara-struck long ago!

t_ch: 这破宅子我虽然不打算要了，但它好歹算是我私人财产，高低能卖点钱。你们既然想调查凶宅，我想拜托你们帮我个忙。
t_en: Even though I don't want this busted house anymore, it is still a personal asset. I'd like to sell it no matter the price. If you're going to investigate the haunted house, there's something I'd like to ask you.

t_ch: 我就知道，说吧，要干什么？
t_en: I knew it. Well, what is it?

t_ch: 你这破凶宅还想卖给谁呢？
t_en: Who could you even sell this rickety haunted house to?

t_ch: 卖不卖得出去，不就全看你们调查结果了嘛。
t_en: Well, whether I can sell it or not depends on the results of your investigation, does it not?

t_ch: 小桂子，我看还是回去吧。
t_en: Little Gui, I think we should just head back.

t_ch: 等等，这「探访凶宅」是绝佳的题材，不能错过啊。
t_en: Wait! "Haunted house investigation" is perfect material. We can't miss out on this!

t_ch: 你们在调查凶宅的时候，能不能帮我找到<color=#dbc291ff>「房产证」</color>。没有它，我可卖不了房……
t_en: While you are investigating the haunted house, could you help me find the <color=#dbc291ff>deed</color>? I won't be able to sell it without...

t_ch: 要是能做，我就同意你们探访凶宅如何？
t_en: If you do that, then I'll allow you to visit the haunted house. What do you think?

t_ch: 简单，交给我们好了！
t_en: Easy enough! Leave it to us!

t_ch: …真不知道你这迷之自信到底是从哪里而来。
t_en: ...I really don't know where this baffling self-confidence of yours comes from.

t_ch: 怎么样？出发吗？
t_en: Well? Shall we head on over?

t_ch: 咱们现在就出发！
t_en: Let's head off!

t_ch: …我、我准备好了。
t_en: ...I—I'm ready.

t_ch: 出发！
t_en: Let's go!

t_ch: 稍等一下，我还没准备好
t_en: Hold on a sec. I'm not ready yet.

t_ch: 凶宅…希望藿藿留给我的纸符能有用……
t_en: A haunted house... I hope the paper talisman Huohuo gave us works...

t_ch: 这…是不是和我们之前遭遇「鬼打墙」的地方一模一样啊？好吓人……
t_en: This... Isn't this place exactly the same as the "heliobus labyrinth" that we encountered before? So creepy...

t_ch: 哎，这罗浮仙舟资源有限，只能用看着差不多的样板房拼拼凑凑吧。
t_en: Ah, there is limited resource on the Xianzhou Luofu, I just had to piece things together with a blueprint of a similar house.

t_ch: …前面就是凶宅了吧。
t_en: ...That must be the haunted house up ahead.

t_ch: 今晚就在这里住一晚吧？晚安。
t_en: So we're staying here tonight? Good night!

t_ch: 等等，我还没有蠢到在凶宅里过夜。
t_en: Wait. I'm not stupid enough to spend the night in a haunted house!

t_ch: 我还以为能到室内去看一看呢…
t_en: I thought we would be able to look around inside...

t_ch: 房东大叔说，他搬走的时候，屋内搬空、房门锁死，房产证应该在某个保险箱里。
t_en: The owner said that when he was moving out, the house was cleared out and locked shut. The deed should be in a safe somewhere.

t_ch: 感觉没有想象中那么吓人…
t_en: This isn't as scary as I imagined...

t_ch: …这都已经是罗浮样板房了，能有多吓人啊。
t_en: ...This is a Luofu model house. How scary can it be?

t_ch: 总之，我们先去找到房产证，顺便调查岁阳真相——两件事情一次解决，最后发布「探访凶宅」的帖子，肯定能涨不少粉丝数！
t_en: Either way, we need to find the deed and investigate the truth behind this heliobus while we're at it. Two birds, one stone. Then, we'll put up a "haunted house investigation" post and rake in the followers!

t_ch: 你真是想得太顺利了，我有些担心了…对了，你们不觉得那块广告板非常突兀吗？
t_en: You make it all sound so easy! I'm a little concerned... Come to think of it, don't you think that advertisement board over there is a little out of place?

t_ch: 这是民宅应该有的东西吗？
t_en: Is this something that should be in a civilian home?

t_ch: …不应该吧。
t_en: ...Nope.

t_ch: 走，我们调查看看。
t_en: Come on. Let's go take a look.

t_ch: 现在就去调查看看吧…
t_en: See what we can find out...

t_ch: …事不宜迟，现在就看看。
t_en: ...No time to waste. Let's go now.

t_ch: 看上去有些突兀的广告板，没人会在家里放着这玩意儿。
t_en: An advertisement board that looks a little out of place. No one would have something like this in their house.

t_ch: （仔细检查）
t_en: (Investigate closely)

t_ch: 哇哦，竟然是卡芙卡的通缉令。
t_en: Woah, there's a wanted poster for Kafka!

t_ch: 随着「建木」事件过去了一段时日，罗浮仙舟也应早早撤下了对星核猎手的通缉令，但是基层工作总是有些延迟，你在街头上有时还能看到卡芙卡通缉令。
t_en: Given that some time passed since the "Ambrosial Arbor" incident, the Luofu should have already removed the wanted notice for the Stellaron Hunters. However, grassroots-level work can be slow, and you may still see Kafka's wanted poster on the streets.

t_ch: 不过，一张卡芙卡通缉令出现这里，在一个像是「鬼打墙」的民宅院里。你和小伙伴们都应该对它的突兀感有所警惕。
t_en: However, a wanted poster for Kafka appearing here, in the courtyard of an apparent haunted house, should raise some caution among you and your companions due to its unexpected nature.

t_ch: 但是它不该出现在这里，建议你凑近一些看看。
t_en: It shouldn't be here. You should probably get closer and take a look.

t_ch: 就在你凑近观察的时候，广告板突然活了过来一般，翻转了过来。
t_en: Just as you move closer to inspect, the advertisement board suddenly flips over, like it's come to life.

t_ch: （触摸一下）
t_en: (Touch it)

t_ch: （凑近一些）
t_en: (Get closer)

t_ch: 原来还有这样的事情。
t_en: Who would have expected this?

t_ch: …此时你想到的是？
t_en: ...Your first thought right now is...?

t_ch: 这必然是凶宅的线索！
t_en: This must be a clue about the haunted house!

t_ch: 不错。
t_en: That's right.

t_ch: 好酷！还有吗？
t_en: Cool! Are there any more?

t_ch: 对不起，产能不够。
t_en: Sorry, not enough have been produced.

t_ch: 刃的通缉令是不是也可以？
t_en: What about a wanted poster for Blade?

t_ch: 不可以。
t_en: No way!

t_ch: 我现在就想撕下来！
t_en: I want to tear it down!

t_ch: …住手。
t_en: ...Stop.

t_ch: 她真好看。
t_en: She is beautiful.

t_ch: 正确，但现在也许不是说这个的时候。
t_en: Correct, but now is not the time to be saying such things.
*Crash*

t_ch: 就像是有人注意到了你正盯着通缉令，一块异色的石头在你眼前掉在了地上。
t_en: A strangely-colored stone falls down before your eyes, as if someone has noticed you looking at the wanted poster.

t_ch: 四下没有旁人，它究竟是如何出现的？你将它捡起来，立刻意识到它可能是重要线索。
t_en: There is no one around. Just where did this come from? As you pick it up, you realize that this is probably an important clue.

t_ch: 随后，你听到背后传出了幽冥般的声音，它像是直接传入脑内的回响。
t_en: At that moment, you hear a ghostly voice coming from behind you, like an echo that directly imprints into your brain.
...Save... Me...

t_ch: …这里…好黑，我…不想被关在这里……
t_en: ...It's... so dark. I... I don't want to be trapped here...

t_ch: 请来找到我…这块磁铁石…是最初的线索……
t_en: Please find me... This magnetic stone... Is the first clue...

t_ch: 带着它…来找我…来…救我……
t_en: Bring it... Come and find me... Come and... save me...

t_ch: 虚弱的声音戛然而止。
t_en: The weakened voice comes to an abrupt halt.

t_ch: …你们听到了吗？是冤魂！
t_en: ...Did you hear that? It was a vengeful spirit!

t_ch: 我还以为只有我能听见…
t_en: I thought only I could hear it...

t_ch: 听到了，我有点不想救它了。
t_en: I heard it. I suddenly don't really want to rescue them.

t_ch: 什、什么冤魂啊，那是岁阳吧！
t_en: Wh—What do you mean by a vengeful spirit? That was obviously a heliobus, right?

t_ch: 哎，是是是。看来线索就藏在这座宅邸里，只要找到岁阳，一切问题就能迎刃而解。
t_en: Ah, yes, yes! It looks like all of the clues are hidden in this residence. All we need to do is find the heliobus, and all these problems will be solved.

t_ch: 这块磁石肯定是有什么用的，你先收好吧。
t_en: This magnetic stone must have some use. Take it for now.

t_ch: （事不宜迟，现在就去找找这里有什么线索吧……）
t_en: (There's no time to waste. Let's take a look around for any clues around here...)

t_ch: 破损的箱子，因其沉重而难以移动。箱子锁眼已经锈蚀，上方有拳头大小的破洞，箱子内部似乎有什么金属物件。也许有什么办法能将箱子里的东西取出来……
t_en: A broken box that is hard to move due to its weight. The lock is corroded, and there is a hole the size of a fist on the topside. It looks like there is something metallic inside. Perhaps there is a way to get the item out from the box...

t_ch: （使用道具）
t_en: (Try using an item)

t_ch: （放弃）
t_en: (Give up)

t_ch: 磁铁石靠近箱子底部后，你听到一声金属物件贴近箱子内壁的声音。你引导着箱子内部的物件，将它从箱子的缺口处取出。
t_en: With the magnetic stone placed near the base of the box, you heard the metallic item cling to the side of it. You guide the item to the missing hole in the top and extract it.

t_ch: 如果使用<color=#dbc291ff>强磁性的磁石</color>，也许能将箱子里的东西取出来……
t_en: If you use a strongly <color=#dbc291ff>magnetic stone</color>, you may be able to remove the item from the box...

t_ch: 紧闭的门，需要钥匙才能打开。
t_en: A door that is sealed shut, it requires a key to open.

t_ch: （使用道具）
t_en: (Try using an item)

t_ch: （放弃）
t_en: (Give up)

t_ch: 院门被你轻松打开，钥匙也断在锁眼里…就让它待在里面吧。
t_en: You easily opened the courtyard door and the key broke off in the lock... Let's just leave that there.

t_ch: 断裂的云骑阵刀。很锋利，先拿走吧，也许能用得上。
t_en: It's a broken Cloud Knights' devastator glaive. It is extremely sharp, so you decide to take it with you in case it comes in handy.

t_ch: 古旧的铃铛。似乎是用于招来小动物的道具，先拿走吧，也许能用得上。
t_en: An old bell. It looks like an item used to call a small animal. Let's take it, it may come in handy later.

t_ch: 沉重的石砖。似乎刻印着什么文字，但难以阅读。要是能用<color=#dbc291ff>拓片纸</color>将它拓下来就能阅读了吧？
t_en: A heavy stone. It looks like it is engraved with some kind of script, but it is hard to make out. Maybe if you could use <color=#dbc291ff>rubbing paper</color>, you may be able to copy the inscription and read it?

t_ch: （使用道具）
t_en: (Try using an item)

t_ch: （放弃）
t_en: (Give up)

t_ch: 你翻出几页未经使用的拓片纸，将它贴在石砖上，仔细拓下石砖上的内容。
t_en: You flick through a few pages of unused rubbing paper and place it on the stone, and carefully rub on the message on the stone.

t_ch: 奇异的手印在这里停留。你仔细观察，这里藏着废弃的拓片纸。
t_en: The strange hand prints remain. Upon closer inspection, there is scrapped rubbing paper hidden around here.

t_ch: 不知何时的食盒，装在其中的食物却像是刚做好不久。
t_en: A discarded food box. The food inside seems to have been prepared very recently.

t_ch: 将食物取出。
t_en: Remove the food from inside.

t_ch: 你将食盒中小吃尽数取出，做成了一个「像是饭团」的东西，这院中会有饥饿的家伙需要它吗？
t_en: You remove all of the food items from within and make it into something that "looks like a rice ball." Is there a hungry someone in this courtyard in need of this?

t_ch: 一家三口的照片。上面写着「初到仙舟纪念。——雷诺」，署上的时间似乎是百年前……
t_en: A picture of a family of three. On it is written: "When we first arrived in Xianzhou — Renault." It seems to be dated about a hundred years ago...

t_ch: 这附近到处都调查看看，应该有我们漏掉的线索。
t_en: Let's investigate the area again. We must have missed some clues.

t_ch: 损坏的快递箱子。封箱胶带十分结实，有没有什么办法能打开箱子呢？
t_en: A broken courier package. The sealing tape seems very strong. Wonder if there's a way to open it?

t_ch: （使用道具）
t_en: (Try using an item)

t_ch: （放弃）
t_en: (Give up)

t_ch: 断裂的云骑阵刀轻松裁开了封箱胶带，你从箱子里杂物中找到了一把钥匙。
t_en: The broken Cloud Knights' devastator glaive easily tears through the packing tape, and you obtain a key from the various items inside.

t_ch: 这块磁铁石是用来做什么的呀？
t_en: What is this magnet used for?

t_ch: 应该能找到隐藏起来的金属物件吧，总之都得试试。

t_ch: 嗯，分头行动的话，可以抽一组人来查下这通讯的来源在哪。
t_en: Yeah. If we split up, we can task one group with tracing this call to its source.

t_ch: 小桂子，你觉得呢？
t_en: Little Gui, what do you think?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，能不能别学我说话？这样感觉好奇怪！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, can you stop talking like me? It sounds super weird!

t_ch: 我们分头行动，我们去和发帖人见面问清楚，藿藿你就去查查「恐怖通话」的来源。
t_en: Let's split up. We'll meet up with the thread's OP; Huohuo, you can go investigate the source of the "scary call."

t_ch: 嗯，我去地衡司问问。
t_en: Okay, I'll go to the Realm-Keeping Commission and ask around.

t_ch: 我认出来了，你就是那个主播！
t_en: I knew it was you. You're that streamer!

t_ch: 你是「阿月要多学习」？
t_en: Are you "A-Yue_StraightAs"?

t_ch: 是我，你们喊我「阿月」就好了。
t_en: Yeah, you can just call me A-Yue, though.

t_ch: 小桂子，要再核对下身份吗？
t_en: Little Gui, would you authenticate the ID again?

t_ch: 在外面还是叫我「桂乃芬」吧，咳咳。
t_en: Please call me Guinaifen when we're out, ahem.

t_ch: 阿月姑娘，你能给我们讲讲到底是怎么一回事吗？
t_en: Miss A-Yue, can you please tell us what's going on?

t_ch: 每到深夜，我的玉兆都会接到匿名的通话请求。我壮着胆子接通了，对方说要和我见面，有话想跟我说。
t_en: Late every night, my jade abacus receives anonymous call requests. I gather my courage to answer, and the person on the other end says they want to meet me, that they have something to tell me.

t_ch: 之后再打过来，声音就变得很诡异，似人非人，有时是问我怎么不来，有时又突然凄厉地嚎起来，差点没把我人给带走。
t_en: When they call back later, the voice grows really weird as though it weren't human, asking me why I haven't yet come or suddenly bawling out in misery to the point that I'm almost carried off.

t_ch: 你有得罪过什么人吗？
t_en: Have you offended anyone?

t_ch: 当然没有，我很少出门，怎么会和人结仇呢？
t_en: Of course not. I never really go out. How could I make any enemies?

t_ch: 你还记得对方说的地址吗？
t_en: Do you remember what address they said?

t_ch: 记得，我一直记录在玉兆里。
t_en: I do. I record everything in my jade abacus.

t_ch: 我本来想去，但港口四下无人，我有种背后发毛的感觉，就不敢去了。但我又管不住我这该死的好奇心…所以我想拜托你们代我前去赴约。
t_en: I planned on going but there was nobody at the harbor and I got this feeling, which made my hair stand on end, so I didn't venture out. But I can't control my cursed curiosity... and so I want to ask you to help me go and keep this appointment.

t_ch: 具体的坐标我发给你们了，麻烦你代我和那家伙见面吧，拜托了。
t_en: I'll send you the coordinates. Please help meet that guy for me, please.

t_ch: 看坐标的话是在这儿没错了……
t_en: Judging by the coordinates, it's right here...

t_ch: 藿藿？小心！
t_en: Huohuo? Watch out!

t_ch: 藿藿你怎么会在这儿？
t_en: Huohuo, what are you doing here?

t_ch: 对啊，咱们不是分头行动吗？
t_en: Oh yeah, shouldn't we have split up?

t_ch: 我刚从地衡司回来，录事帮我调了玉兆的通话记录，上面显示信息源头在这里。
t_en: I just got back from the Realm-Keeping Commission, where the clerk helped me retrieve call logs from my jade abacus. The data shows the source of the call was here.

t_ch: 很抱歉，尾巴不在，我…我…我给大家添麻烦了。
t_en: I'm very sorry but Tail isn't here. I... I... I've made trouble for everyone.

t_ch: 我们什么交情呐，你可千万别这么想。
t_en: We're friends. So don't even sweat it.

t_ch: 就是，你没事就好。
t_en: Yeah, so long as you're fine, that's all that matters.

t_ch: 打断一下，你们是不是忘了什么…
t_en: Excuse me. Have you forgotten about something...?

t_ch: 那这家伙是？
t_en: Who's that guy?

t_ch: …它就是打来恐怖电话的那位，玉兆的追踪源头显示就在它身上。
t_en: ...It's the one who made that scary prank call. The jade abacus tracking display is right on top of it.

t_ch: 可是…普通的魔阴身会用玉兆吗？
t_en: But... can the mara-struck actually use jade abaci?

t_ch: 这就得问这位「当事人」了。
t_en: That's a question we'll have to ask of the "involved party."

t_ch: 还是先跟它聊聊吧。
t_en: Let's chat with it first.

t_ch: 我在旁边守着，免得它反扑。
t_en: I'll stand guard and make sure it doesn't attack.

t_ch: …快，快搭把手。
t_en: ...Quick, help me out.

t_ch: 诸位身手了得，能制服这种凶物，麻烦你们好人做到底，让我附身躲几天。
t_en: Taking out such a vicious creature means you're all outstandingly capable. Please, won't you be good to the very end and let me possess you for a few days?

t_ch: …这种气息好熟悉…你是岁阳！
t_en: ...This stench seems familiar... Why, you're a heliobus!

t_ch: 咦？这都被你发现了，行吧，那我也不装了。
t_en: Huh? So you can tell. Fine, no use pretending anymore.

t_ch: 算我倒霉，找个路人寄居，结果这家伙突然发起疯来，我受不了了！你们能不能帮个忙，放我出去，再借个身体让我住上几天？
t_en: Just my luck — I find a host body and it turns out to be a stark raving lunatic. I can't take this! Can you please do me a solid here and let me out so I can borrow another body for a couple of days?

t_ch: 这种话你都说得出来？
t_en: How can you even say this?

t_ch: 有什么问题吗？
t_en: Is there a problem?

t_ch: 干脆把命借给你得了。
t_en: I might as well just lend you my life.

t_ch: 那怎么好意思啊…我也不过是想暂时寄居个几天，用你们的身体吃吃喝喝，休养一下，没这么麻烦。
t_en: The nerve... I'd just be temporarily borrowing it for a couple of days, using your body to eat and drink and rest a bit. It's no big deal.

t_ch: 且慢，你先把之前半夜扰民的事交代清楚，不说清楚别想走。
t_en: Wait up. Please clear up for me what all that midnight ruckus was about before. You're not going anywhere until you do.

t_ch: 好好好，我说还不行吗。再说了，我现在压根逃不出来。暴起伤人的事不是我干的。她疯得厉害，我控制不住。
t_en: Fine! Didn't I already tell you? Besides, there's absolutely no way I can escape right now. I wasn't the one who did all that violent stuff. She's incredibly insane and outside my control.

t_ch: 至于什么「深夜扰民」，那是我只能在那个时候抢到身体的控制权啊。
t_en: As for that "midnight ruckus," that was when I'd finally managed to wrest back control.

t_ch: 喏，她身上有枚玉兆，里面存了个紧急联系人，所以我就一遍遍地打过去求助。至于后来的事，那就不用我多说了吧。
t_en: Well, she had a jade abacus on her with an emergency contact in it, so I kept trying to call them. I don't need to tell you what happened next.

t_ch: 好了，该交代的我全部交代完了，你们到底帮不帮忙啊！
t_en: Alright, I've finished explaining everything to you. Now are you going to help me or not!

t_ch: 我有能将你带走的办法，但…身体不能借给你，你给我去牢里好好待着去。
t_en: I've got a way to get you out, but... I can't let you borrow me. You'll have to go to prison and wait a while.

t_ch: 好说好说，只要能从这具肉体里挣脱出来，不必跟一个发癫的家伙绑在一块儿，一切都好说……
t_en: That's great. That's great... Everything is going to be great, so long as I can get out of this meat-suit and I'm not stuck together with this maniac...

t_ch: 嗯，那你出来吧。
t_en: Well, come on out then.

t_ch: 你面前的幽府武弁发出一阵吃力的嘶吼声。你和你的同伴观望许久，但什么都没发生。
t_en: The Wraith Warden belts out a strained roar. You and your companions watch on for ages, but nothing happens.

t_ch: 我、我尽力啦！怎么都无法从这具身体里离开……
t_en: That's... the best I can do! I can't get out of this body, no matter what I try...

t_ch: 这家伙脑袋里有个怎么也放不下的念头，把咱们紧紧捆在了一起。
t_en: There's this thought stuck in this girl's head. She doesn't let it go no matter what, and it's binding us together tightly.

t_ch: 魔阴身…的执念？
t_en: The mara-struck's... lingering obsession?

t_ch: 莫非是…那个紧急联系人？
t_en: Could it be... their emergency contact?

t_ch: 呜嗷啊啊啊……
t_en: Aghhhh...!

t_ch: 咳咳咳咳，刚才不是我叫的，没吓着你们吧。就在刚才那一瞬，我读到了这家伙残存的念头了，嚯，我明白她想要什么了！
t_en: Ahem ahem, that wasn't me just then. Hope I didn't scare you. Just then, I managed to read the last remaining thought stuck in this girl's head. Hooboy, I know what she wants now!

t_ch: 她想见玉兆里那个紧急联系人最后一面，说声再见。
t_en: She wants to see the emergency contact in her jade abacus one last time to say one final goodbye.

t_ch: 是为了和朋友告别吗？
t_en: To say goodbye to a friend?

t_ch: 可是…且不说她的朋友愿不愿意看到一个魔阴身朝自己走来。她自己也不想以这般模样去见朋友吧？
t_en: But... that's not to mention whether or not her friend wants to meet up with the mara-struck. She doesn't want her friend to see her like this, right?

t_ch: 这个问题倒是好办。只要你们将我从她身体里放出来…我一定帮她完成心愿。
t_en: This is a problem that's easily taken care of. If you just let me out of her body... I'll definitely help grant her wish.

t_ch: 我明白了…
t_en: I get it...

t_ch: 我们会让她安息的。
t_en: We'll let her rest in peace.

t_ch: 嚯，总算解脱了！竟能把我困在其中…真是了不得的执念。
t_en: Oh yeah, finally free! Trapping me inside herself like that... what an incredibly powerful obsession.

t_ch: 出于对这份力量的敬重，我会实现她最后的愿望的。
t_en: I will grant her final wish out of respect for such formidable power.

t_ch: 走吧，咱们去见见那个让她如此挂念的人。
t_en: C'mon, let's go and see who it is she's so infatuated with.

t_ch: 别急，待我先照着她的形象变个模样！
t_en: Don't worry. I'll just change into her appearance first!

t_ch: 好了，我记得就是这副模样。
t_en: Good. That's how I remember it.

t_ch: …你是？
t_en: ...And you are?

t_ch: 你怎么回事，我们刚刚才聊完，我是煨赫——就是刚刚和你聊天的岁阳呀。
t_en: What's up with you? We were just chatting. I'm Singerd — the heliobus you were just talking with.

t_ch: 注意措辞，别穿帮了！
t_en: Watch your phrasing! And don't blow your cover!

t_ch: 放心放心！
t_en: Don't worry!

t_ch: 走走走，该出发咯！
t_en: C'mon, let's get moving!

t_ch: 我正准备回去呢，…是你…这么多年，你居然想到回来了？
t_en: I'm about to go back right now... It's you... After all these years, you're finally thinking of coming back?

t_ch: 是我，我回来了。
t_en: It's me. I'm back.

t_ch: …我以为你讨厌我才避而不见。
t_en: ...I thought you avoided me because you hated me.

t_ch: 怎么会呢，要是你当时没骂醒我，可能我现在还是个神憎鬼厌的混蛋吧。
t_en: How could I? If it weren't for you scolding me then, maybe I'd still be an insufferable wretch now.

t_ch: …我以前不该这么凶你的，也不该擅自替你报名…是我当时一心想着能把你送走，才做出这种蠢事。
t_en: ...I shouldn't have been so mean to you before. And I shouldn't have signed you up without asking first... All I was thinking about then was sending you off, and that's why I did something so stupid.

t_ch: 过去的事就让它过去吧，别放在心上。而且我感激还来不及呢，要是没有你，我现在肯定还是浑浑噩噩的。
t_en: Let the past be the past. Don't take it to heart. And I'm far too late showing my gratitude — without you, I'd definitely still be all discombobulated.

t_ch: 那个通话的事，很抱歉，是我玉兆坏了，老是有杂音。还好现在见到你。夜深了，你还是先回家吧，一个人在外面晃太久也不好。
t_en: I'm sorry about that call. My jade abacus got broken and everything was static. Good thing I'm seeing you now, then. It's getting late, and you should go home. It's no good hanging around outside when it's this late.

t_ch: 可我们这才聊了多久…那你呢？你就不想回家看看吗？
t_en: But how long were we chatting for? ...So what about you? Don't you want to go home and take a look around?

t_ch: 不了，十王司那边我还有要务在身呢，报完平安…我也该回去了。
t_en: No, I've got something important on with the Ten-Lords Commission. I have come to tell you I'm safe... and I should probably go back now.

t_ch: 出门在外，凡事还是多加小心。…你如今在十王司当差，不比以前，我也帮不上什么忙。
t_en: Always take extra care whenever you leave the house. ...You're running errands now for the Ten Lords. Things are different now, and I can't help you out with anything.

t_ch: 你注意到阿月似乎紧张了起来，手指焦灼地扣着自己的衣角。
t_en: You notice that A-Yue seems anxious as her fingers fidget nervously at the hem of her blouse.
